item.title: Don't embed pointers
item.description: In Go, it’s important to be aware of potential bugs when embedding pointers within structs. This article explores such a scenario and provides alternative solutions to avoid confusion and errors.

item.title: Go has new generic slices and map packages
item.description: Since the introduction of generics in Go 1.18, there have been discussions about adding new helper functions to the standard library to cover most frequent operations. After more than a year, two new libraries with generics will be added12 into the Go standard library starting from Go 1.21.

item.title: Kubectl cheatsheet
item.description: Throughout the years of using kubernetes as a developer I’ve collected a bunch of useful commands that helped me to debug issues and have better understanding of what is happening in the cluster.

item.title: Safe git force push
item.description: You’ve likely been in this situation before. You make some minor code fixes, do git commit --amend to add them to the current commit, and do git push --force. Then, you happily open pull request and see that you’ve deleted you’re colleagues commit.😩

item.title: Introduction to Gonkey -- Testing automation tool
item.description: Gonkey is a testing automation tool that can test your service API without a single line of code.
